creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158623
Patch to make the update of the port

Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update xmlcopyeditor port from 1.2.0.11  to 1.2.1.3 version

# cd /usr/ports/editors/xmlcopyeditor
# patch -p1 < patch_xmlcopyeditor.diff
# rm *.orig files/*.orig

Please remove files/patch-src_styledialog.cpp, files/patch-src_wrapxerces.cpp and files/patch-src_xmlcopyeditor.cpp, as they are not needed anymore. 

The files/patch-po_Makefile.in.in.diff file is new.

Best regards
